# transcript-api

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN ‚Äî do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Agent API: GET /api/conversations/:id/transcript returns the on-disk JSONL path for a conversation's full raw Claude session transcript.
- Server:
  - Uses: `conversations.findTranscriptPath`, `tasks-core.getConversationClaudeSessionId`
  - `GET /api/conversations/:id/transcript`
